segments: حَدَّثَتْنِي عَمَّتِي قَالَتْ إِنِّي جَالِسَةٌ بِفِنَاءِ الْكَعْبَةِ إِذْ أَقْبَلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَلَمَّا رَآنِي مَالَ إِلَيَّ فَسَلَّمَ عَلَيَّ فَقَالَ مَا يُجْلِسُكِ هَاهُنَا فَقُلْتُ أَنْتَظِرُ مَوْلًى لَنَا

قَالَتْ فَقَالَ لِي أَعْتَقْتُمُوهُ قُلْتُ لَا وَ لَكِنْ أَعْتَقْنَا أَبَاهُ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ ذَلِكِ مَوْلَاكُمْ هَذَا أَخُوكُمْ وَ ابْنُ عَمِّكُمْ إِنَّمَا الْمَوْلَى الَّذِي جَرَتْ عَلَيْهِ النِّعْمَةُ فَإِذَا جَرَتْ عَلَى أَبِيهِ وَ جَدِّهِ فَهُوَ ابْنُ عَمِّكِ وَ أَخُوكِ .
arabic.text:
حَدَّثَتْنِي عَمَّتِي قَالَتْ إِنِّي جَالِسَةٌ بِفِنَاءِ الْكَعْبَةِ إِذْ أَقْبَلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَلَمَّا رَآنِي مَالَ إِلَيَّ فَسَلَّمَ عَلَيَّ فَقَالَ مَا يُجْلِسُكِ هَاهُنَا فَقُلْتُ أَنْتَظِرُ مَوْلًى لَنَا

قَالَتْ فَقَالَ لِي أَعْتَقْتُمُوهُ قُلْتُ لَا وَ لَكِنْ أَعْتَقْنَا أَبَاهُ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ ذَلِكِ مَوْلَاكُمْ هَذَا أَخُوكُمْ وَ ابْنُ عَمِّكُمْ إِنَّمَا الْمَوْلَى الَّذِي جَرَتْ عَلَيْهِ النِّعْمَةُ فَإِذَا جَرَتْ عَلَى أَبِيهِ وَ جَدِّهِ فَهُوَ ابْنُ عَمِّكِ وَ أَخُوكِ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Suleym Al Farra, from Al Hassan Bin Muslim who said,

‘My maternal aunt narrated to me. She said, ‘I was seated by the courtyard of the Kabah, when Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> came over. So when he<sup>asws</sup> saw me, altered his<sup>asws</sup> course towards me. So he<sup>asws</sup> greeted me and he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘What makes you sit over here?’ So I said, ‘I am awaiting a slave of ours’.

She said, ‘So he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘Emancipate him’. I said, ‘No, but we have emancipated his father’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘That is not your slave. This is your brother, and a son of your uncle. But rather, the slave is the one upon whom the bounty flowed. So when it flowed upon his father and his grandfather, so he is a son of your uncle, and your brother’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Suleym Al Farra, from Al Hassan Bin Muslim who said,

‘My maternal aunt narrated to me. She said, ‘I was seated by the courtyard of the Kabah, when Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> came over. So when he<sup>asws</sup> saw me, altered his<sup>asws</sup> course towards me. So he<sup>asws</sup> greeted me and he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘What makes you sit over here?’ So I said, ‘I am awaiting a slave of ours’.

She said, ‘So he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘Emancipate him’. I said, ‘No, but we have emancipated his father’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘That is not your slave. This is your brother, and a son of your uncle. But rather, the slave is the one upon whom the bounty flowed. So when it flowed upon his father and his grandfather, so he is a son of your uncle, and your brother’.

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ سُلَيْمٍ الْفَرَّاءِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ

segments: قَالَ إِنَّمَا الْمَوْلَى الْجَلِيبُ الْعَتِيقُ وَ ابْنُهُ عَرَبِيٌّ وَ ابْنُ ابْنِهِ مِنْ أَنْفُسِهِمْ .
arabic.text: قَالَ إِنَّمَا الْمَوْلَى الْجَلِيبُ الْعَتِيقُ وَ ابْنُهُ عَرَبِيٌّ وَ ابْنُ ابْنِهِ مِنْ أَنْفُسِهِمْ .

segments: From him, from Al Barqy, from Sa’ad Bin Sa’ad, from Abdullah Bin Jundab,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘But rather the slave of Al-Jaleed is old, and his son is an Arab, and a son of his son, is from himself’.
en.hubeali.text:
From him, from Al Barqy, from Sa’ad Bin Sa’ad, from Abdullah Bin Jundab,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘But rather the slave of Al-Jaleed is old, and his son is an Arab, and a son of his son, is from himself’.

narratorChain.raw: عَنْهُ عَنِ الْبَرْقِيِّ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جُنْدَبٍ يَرْفَعُهُ إِلَى أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

segments: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ مَعِي عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ فَقَالَ لِي مَنْ هَذَا فَقُلْتُ مَوْلًى لَنَا فَقَالَ أَعْتَقْتُمُوهُ أَوْ أَبَاهُ فَقُلْتُ بَلْ أَبَاهُ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ هَذَا مَوْلَاكَ هَذَا أَخُوكَ وَ ابْنُ عَمِّكَ وَ إِنَّمَا الْمَوْلَى هُوَ الَّذِي جَرَتْ عَلَيْهِ النِّعْمَةُ فَإِذَا جَرَتْ عَلَى أَبِيهِ فَهُوَ أَخُوكَ وَ ابْنُ عَمِّكَ .
arabic.text: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ مَعِي عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ فَقَالَ لِي مَنْ هَذَا فَقُلْتُ مَوْلًى لَنَا فَقَالَ أَعْتَقْتُمُوهُ أَوْ أَبَاهُ فَقُلْتُ بَلْ أَبَاهُ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ هَذَا مَوْلَاكَ هَذَا أَخُوكَ وَ ابْنُ عَمِّكَ وَ إِنَّمَا الْمَوْلَى هُوَ الَّذِي جَرَتْ عَلَيْهِ النِّعْمَةُ فَإِذَا جَرَتْ عَلَى أَبِيهِ فَهُوَ أَخُوكَ وَ ابْنُ عَمِّكَ .

segments: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Is’haq, and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, altogether, from Bakr Bin Muhammad Al Azdy who said,

‘I went over to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> and with me was Ali Bin Abdul Aziz. So he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘Who is this?’ So I said, ‘A slave of ours’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Have you emancipated him, or his father?’ So I said, ‘But his father’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This one is not your slave. This is your brother, and a son of your uncle. But rather, the slave, he is the one upon whom the bounty flows. So when it flowed upon his father, so he is your brother, and a son of your uncle’.
en.hubeali.text:
Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Is’haq, and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, altogether, from Bakr Bin Muhammad Al Azdy who said,

‘I went over to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> and with me was Ali Bin Abdul Aziz. So he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘Who is this?’ So I said, ‘A slave of ours’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Have you emancipated him, or his father?’ So I said, ‘But his father’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This one is not your slave. This is your brother, and a son of your uncle. But rather, the slave, he is the one upon whom the bounty flows. So when it flowed upon his father, so he is your brother, and a son of your uncle’.

narratorChain.raw: الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ وَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ جَمِيعاً عَنْ بَكْرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْأَزْدِيِّ قَالَ

segments: تْ مَرَّ بِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ أَنَا فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ أَنْتَظِرُ مَوْلًى لَنَا فَقَالَ يَا أُمَّ عُثْمَانَ مَا يُقِيمُكِ هَاهُنَا فَقُلْتُ أَنْتَظِرُ مَوْلًى لَنَا فَقَالَ أَعْتَقْتُمُوهُ فَقُلْتُ لَا فَقَالَ أَعْتَقْتُمْ أَبَاهُ قُلْتُ لَا أَعْتَقْنَا جَدَّهُ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ هَذَا مَوْلَاكُمْ بَلْ هَذَا أَخُوكُمْ .
arabic.text: تْ مَرَّ بِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ أَنَا فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ أَنْتَظِرُ مَوْلًى لَنَا فَقَالَ يَا أُمَّ عُثْمَانَ مَا يُقِيمُكِ هَاهُنَا فَقُلْتُ أَنْتَظِرُ مَوْلًى لَنَا فَقَالَ أَعْتَقْتُمُوهُ فَقُلْتُ لَا فَقَالَ أَعْتَقْتُمْ أَبَاهُ قُلْتُ لَا أَعْتَقْنَا جَدَّهُ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ هَذَا مَوْلَاكُمْ بَلْ هَذَا أَخُوكُمْ .

segments: Bakr Bin Muhammad, from Juweyria who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> passed by me, and I was in the Sacred Masjid, awaiting a slave of ours. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘O Umm Usman! What makes you stay over here?’ So I said, ‘I am awaiting a slave of ours’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Have you emancipated him?’ So I said, ‘No’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Have you emancipated his father?’ I said, ‘No. We emancipated his grandfather’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is not your slave, but this is your brother’.
en.hubeali.text:
Bakr Bin Muhammad, from Juweyria who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> passed by me, and I was in the Sacred Masjid, awaiting a slave of ours. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘O Umm Usman! What makes you stay over here?’ So I said, ‘I am awaiting a slave of ours’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Have you emancipated him?’ So I said, ‘No’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Have you emancipated his father?’ I said, ‘No. We emancipated his grandfather’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is not your slave, but this is your brother’.

narratorChain.raw: بَكْرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ جُوَيْرَةَ قَالَ

segments: Muhammad Bin yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Musa Bin Umar, from A man, from Al Husayn Bin Ulwan,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘A companion of twenty years is a relative’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Musa Bin Umar, from A man, from Al Husayn Bin Ulwan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘A companion of twenty years is a relative’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُوسَى بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنْ رَجُلٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عُلْوَانَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
